Container.$Comment: Overrides the shipped NPCs/Livestock/Drop_Chicken.json. An override REPLACES the whole file, so the original raw chicken + light hide drops are re-included below, plus a new chance to drop the Hearty Snack from the custom-food pack.

Containers.$Comment: Original drop, kept: raw chicken, always.
Original drop, kept: light hide, always.
NEW: this Choice always fires (Weight 100 inside the Multiple), then picks ONE of its children by weight — the snack or nothing.
Set HIGH for testing so one kill confirms the wiring. For real play lower it (e.g. Snack 5 / Empty 95 = a 5% drop).
Raise this weight to make the snack rarer. Empty = the 'chance for nothing' outcome; only valid inside a Choice/Multiple.
